description_long: This is a modern L-shaped chaise with a dark gray fabric upholstery, featuring a right-side extended lounge section. The backrest is gently curved and rises to a medium height, providing comfortable support along the entire length of the seating area. Both ends of the chaise have armrests, with the right armrest being slightly higher and more pronounced. The seat consists of three distinct, rectangular cushions, with the rightmost cushion forming the extended lounge. The legs are short, straight, and made of dark wood, giving the piece a sturdy yet elegant appearance. The overall design is sleek and minimal, suitable for contemporary urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or stylish outdoor patios.
description: A modern, L-shaped dark gray chaise with a right-side lounge extension, curved backrest, and short wooden legs. Features three seat cushions and armrests on both ends.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three seat cushions, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Left-side perspective highlighting the depth of the lounge extension and the curved backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, unbroken backrest and the alignment of the legs.
description_view_3: Right-side perspective emphasizing the extended lounge section and the right armrest.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is medium-height, gently curved, and runs the full length of the chaise, providing continuous support. It is smooth and unsegmented, with no visible tufting or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both the left and right sides, with the right armrest being slightly higher and more pronounced.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and made of dark wood, with a simple, sturdy design and no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid dark gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern or tufting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are three rectangular seat cushions, with the rightmost cushion forming the extended lounge section. All cushions appear to be loose and evenly spaced, providing a uniform seating surface.
